issues_found: Source type is navigation_page - per Rule 5, navigation pages must be rejected
Source is a portal/directory page providing links to FOMC materials rather than containing substantive policy content itself
No specific rate decisions, economic projections, policy signals, or market-relevant data present
event_type incorrectly set to 'unknown' when the page is clearly a navigation/index resource
The page references a March 18, 2026 FOMC press conference, but the actual policy content would be in linked documents (statements, minutes) not this page
Per Rule 6, navigation pages and thin low-signal sources bias toward reject
human_review_reason: The record correctly self-identifies this as a navigation page with no standalone archival value. The source fails clear, objective criteria under Rule 5. No judgment call needed.
